violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink by prep sink. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025
Several floor tiles under the 3 bay sink are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

The floors under shelving and vent on wall area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025
